use_cases: Wrapping form fields with built-in validation from Base UI
Creating structured form layouts with consistent spacing and alignment
Building contact forms, registration forms, and data collection interfaces
Integrating with Base UI's form primitives for accessible form handling
Serving as the root container for multi-step form workflows
ai_summary: A lightweight Form wrapper component built on Base UI's FormPrimitive that provides a flex column layout with consistent gap spacing. This atomic component serves as the root container for form fields, supporting validation, accessibility, and structured data collection. Ideal for SaaS applications, developer tools, and any web form requiring a clean, accessible foundation.
